subject: Civic Education
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Learners to carry out research and develop a report on factors that hinder good citizenship
topics: among the members of the community.
This subtopic will look at issues of promoting social justice especially among the less privileged and
the needy. It is cardinal that you learn about ways of promoting social justice in society as a way to
activities: Identifying groups of people at family or school level
Teaching Materials: Pictorial or video presentation of a Family Tree and School Groups
